# Razim Saidov — SAP Consultant

> Razim Saidov, MSc is a professional SAP Consultant covering SAP HANA, ABAP
> development, SAP CAP, SAP BTP, SAP NetWeaver, BW/4HANA, SAP Business One, SAP
> Joule and Business AI. The practice is based in Austria and works across the
> DACH region, with remote delivery available worldwide.

Razim Saidov works where data, application, platform and AI questions meet,
turning sound technical decisions into work that holds up in production. The
approach favors direct communication, practical architecture, production-minded
code and documentation that lets the next engineer understand why a system is
shaped the way it is.

This is a static, privacy-respecting website with no analytics, advertising, or
tracking. Content is available in English (default) and German.

## Services

- **SAP HANA** — End-to-end HANA system delivery and operations: installation,
  configuration, administration, lifecycle maintenance, data modeling,
  SQLScript and systematic performance engineering (HANA 2.0).
- **SAP ABAP** — ABAP development for robust SAP extensions and integrations,
  with focused experience in Grants Management, Public Sector and FI/CO
  processes (ABAP OO, BAdIs, enhancements).
- **SAP CAP & XSA Development** — Enterprise-grade CAP and SAP HANA XS Advanced
  (XSA) applications and extensions: domain modeling, OData services, HDI
  containers, Fiori integration, authorization and maintainable delivery.
- **SAP BTP** — Architecture and delivery on SAP BTP: secure connectivity,
  identity and access, integration, CI/CD and well-operated cloud workloads
  (Cloud Foundry, XSUAA, Integration Suite).
- **SAP NetWeaver & BW** — Architecture, delivery and operations for SAP
  NetWeaver, BW/4HANA and BW on HANA, with clear data modeling, data flows,
  integration and dependable reporting foundations.
- **SAP Business One** — Integration and extension services that improve
  reporting, system interoperability and day-to-day operating processes
  (Service Layer, APIs, add-ons).
- **SAP Joule & Business AI** — Joule readiness, Joule Studio extensions, skills
  and agent design, grounded in trusted business context, role-based access and
  practical governance.
- **AI Integration & Automation** — Practical AI solutions that connect SAP data
  and processes with approved AI services for retrieval, document intelligence
  and workflow automation.

## Coverage

- Based in Austria; primary service region is DACH (Austria, Germany,
  Switzerland). Remote engagements are available worldwide.
- Working languages: English and German.

## Contact

Use the contact form at https://saidov.net/#contact. The email address is
published only on the website itself and is intentionally not included in this
file.
